subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Give thanks unto the Glorious Lord, for thou hast caused His Holiness, the Friend, to be glorified in the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق شکر کن رب جلیل را که حضرت خلیل را در ملکوت ابهی متباهی نمودی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
